data.title: Dow Gains Over 200 Points But Records Weekly Loss: Fear Among Investors Eases But Greed Index Remains In 'Extreme Fear' Zone
Eddy Cue Praises 'Severance' For Breaking Through The Noise Globally, Says Apple TV+ Isn't Going To Throw 20 Shows On The Wall Hoping One Will Stick
data.description: Apple's Eddy Cue praised Severance as Apple TV+'s most culturally impactful hit while reaffirming the company's "quality over quantity" strategy in a crowded streaming market.

data.title: Bitcoin, Dogecoin Bled But These Gold-Backed Cryptos Preserved Investors' Wealth Last Week
data.description: The cryptocurrency market capped last week on a sour note after Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) crashed to $80,000 on Sunday evening. While the broader market crashed, investors sought refuge in gold-backed coins.
